title: Executive Appreciation Letter
detail: Received formal recognition from the Senior Executive VP for flawlessly managing a massive backlog of Trade Finance transactions during a critical system migration.

title: Employee of the Year
detail: Awarded for outstanding operational excellence and achieving a 0% error rate in Letters of Credit document examination over a 12-month period.

title: Disaster Recovery Champion
detail: Successfully led the branch disaster recovery simulation, ensuring all corporate banking networks securely failed over to backup servers with zero data loss.
